query: Am I on any medications for blood pressure?
label: cold_P5.2
answer:
Your last cholesterol reading from 2026-04-05 was:

Total Cholesterol: 237 mg/dL
LDL: 162 mg/dL
HDL: 38 mg/dL
Triglycerides: 186 mg/dL

These levels show your cholesterol and triglycerides are higher than ideal, and your HDL (the "good" cholesterol) is on the low side.
Yes, you are on blood pressure medications:

Telmisartan 40 mg
Amlodipine 5 mg
Aspirin 75 mg

Your most recent blood pressure was 138/88 mmHg (recorded 2026-04-02), which is Stage 1 hypertension. Your doctor has you on these medications to help manage it.
Not medical advice — talk to your doctor before acting on this.
